reviews.review_description: Ty for addressing the problem devs and the amount of time it took to reaponse I highly recommend this one if u r a puzzler and even if like me and hate timers I think that’s what made it fun snd that’s the  first time it didnt bother me for the simple fact of it’s realistic times to finish the level instead of just looking at dollar signs only so far cery fair!! Ty devs and can’t wait to see mor games and possibly  mor levels keep adding !!🤩🤩🤩

Time goes fast when you are having fun. 
Just made it to level 51 without issues.  A lot of different modes to play when you leveled up.
the game runs smoothly, and vr interaction feels natural, with solid performance with no noticeable lag. I am looking forward to future updates.
Will come back to it often
